case_title: WILLIAM PENN HOTEL, L.P. VS. SERGIO HERNANDEZ SANDOVAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL, L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, SERGIO HERNANDEZ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 160 EDDY STREET, #228, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169 AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, SERGIO HERNANDEZ DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, SERGIO HERNANDEZ
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL, L.P.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, SERGIO HERNANDEZ
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, SERGIO HERNANDEZ
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL, L.P. SERVED JAN-25-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, SERGIO HERNANDEZ
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, SERGIO HERNANDEZ
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, SERGIO HERNANDEZ
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, SERGIO HERNANDEZ
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL, L.P. SERVED JAN-25-2019, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $19.50 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PENN HOTEL, L.P.
